summary: Clean and clear audience recording; no specific performance commentary
review: The sole reviewer praises the audio as clean, clear, and well‑balanced, noting that this newly released show meets their high expectations for audience recordings. No comments are made about the musical performance, setlist flow, or individual band members, so the show itself cannot be evaluated from the available feedback.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review focusing on excellent sound quality; no information on performance, leading to a rating based mainly on recording clarity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the audio as clean and clear with nothing muddied – overall very listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on musical performance or set pacing were provided.
